candidates.title: ChatGPT's web traffic share dropped from 78% to 54% in one year as Gemini quietly tripled its reach
candidates.content: ChatGPT's web traffic share dropped from 78% to 54% in one year as Gemini quietly tripled its reach
candidates.description:
ChatGPT's website traffic share dropped from 77.6% to 53.7% in just twelve months, according to Similarweb. Google Gemini is the biggest winner, jumping from 7.3% to 26.7%. The numbers only cover web traffic, though, not API usage or apps.
The article ChatGPT's web traffic share dropped from 78

candidates.title: Luma opens Uni-1.1 image model API at prices and quality matching OpenAI and Google
candidates.content: Luma opens Uni-1.1 image model API at prices and quality matching OpenAI and Google
candidates.description: Luma is making its Uni-1.1 image model available via API, with prices starting at $0.04 per image at 2,048-pixel resolution. On the Arena leaderboard, the model ranks third, right behind Google and OpenAI. The API includes web search, built-in reasoning, and support for up to nine reference images.

candidates.title: Microsoft's Edge Copilot can now read all your open tabs at once and write for you on LinkedIn
candidates.content: Microsoft's Edge Copilot can now read all your open tabs at once and write for you on LinkedIn
candidates.description:
Microsoft is upgrading Edge's Copilot AI chatbot so it can read all open tabs at once, compare products, and summarize articles. New additions include long-term memory, a tool that turns tabs into AI podcasts, and a quiz mode.
The article Microsoft's Edge Copilot can now read all your open tabs

candidates.title: Claude for Small Business ships 15 agent workflows that handle payroll, invoices, and tax prep
candidates.content: Claude for Small Business ships 15 agent workflows that handle payroll, invoices, and tax prep
candidates.description: Anthropic is launching "Claude for Small Business," a package of 15 agent-based workflows and integrations for tools like QuickBooks, PayPal, and HubSpot. The company is also rolling out free training courses and a workshop tour across ten US cities as it pushes to bring AI directly to small busines

candidates.title: Claude subscriptions get separate budgets for programmatic use, billed at full API prices
candidates.content: Claude subscriptions get separate budgets for programmatic use, billed at full API prices
candidates.description: As of June 15, Anthropic is splitting programmatic Claude usage out of the existing subscription quota. Instead, subscribers get a dedicated monthly credit ranging from $20 to $200 depending on their plan. Going forward, SDK and third-party requests will be billed at full API rates rather than the s

candidates.title: Meta AI gets a private mode where no conversation data is stored on servers
candidates.content: Meta AI gets a private mode where no conversation data is stored on servers
candidates.description: Meta is rolling out "Incognito Chat" for Meta AI on WhatsApp and in the Meta AI app. According to Mark Zuckerberg, conversations are processed in a protected server environment that even Meta can't access, and chat histories disappear when the session ends. Zuckerberg claims Meta is the first AI lab

candidates.content: Alibaba's Qwen-Image-2.0 doubles compression and cuts generation steps from 40 to 4
candidates.description: Alibaba's technical report on Qwen-Image-2.0 breaks down how the image model compresses images twice as aggressively as most competitors, stabilizes training with a reworked transformer, and uses a dedicated module that automatically expands short user input into detailed prompts. candidates.title: New Claude Mythos becomes the first AI model to clear all cyberattack simulations from Britain's AI safety agency
candidates.content: New Claude Mythos becomes the first AI model to clear all cyberattack simulations from Britain's AI safety agency
candidates.description: The UK's AI Security Institute has revised its estimate of how fast AI cyber capabilities are doubling—twice.
